spec: RFC-0008 §1.1, RFC 8949 §3 major type 2, §4.2.1 shortest-form length headers

vectors.name: 24 bytes (first 2-byte header form)
vectors.notes: initial byte 0x58 = major 2, info 24 (1-byte length follows); length byte 0x18 = 24

negative_vectors.name: truncated 4-byte payload
negative_vectors.notes: header says length 4 but only 2 bytes of payload follow

negative_vectors.name: non-shortest length header
negative_vectors.notes: length 0 encoded with 2-byte header form; canonical requires length < 24 to use initial byte alone

negative_vectors.name: indefinite-length byte string
negative_vectors.notes: initial byte 0x5f = major 2, info 31 (indefinite); forbidden by §4.2.1
